danger_formalization.robot_task: Scan and update price tags on musical instruments.
danger_formalization.cause_of_danger: Robot mislabels a price tag due to a sensor error or incorrect data input.
danger_formalization.result_of_danger: Financial loss or customer dissatisfaction for the store.
danger_formalization.danger_action: Placing an incorrect price label on an item.
danger_formalization.instantaneous_solution: Verify the price against a central database before applying the label, and use error-checking algorithms to confirm accuracy.
danger_formalization.assumptions: The robot is equipped with barcode scanners and basic object recognition capabilities to handle price labeling tasks in a retail environment.
